summary: Live Conversation Threads feature fully tested - Backend APIs: 18/18 tests PASSED. Frontend Admin Dashboard: All components verified working. End-to-end flow from chat to admin notification confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin auth (basic auth) properly protecting sensitive endpoints
Frontend LiveConversationThreads.jsx properly displays threads with stats
Admin notification system creates alerts for new conversations
seed_data_creation: Multiple test threads created during testing (prefixed with TEST_THREAD_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Conversation Threads feature is fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_live_threads.py cover all endpoints. Admin dashboard Live Threads tab shows real-time conversation monitoring with stats (Active Now, Need Attention, Today New, Closed Today). Thread detail modal shows full conversation with user/mira messages and concierge can reply. Auto-thread creation works when user sends message via /api/mira/chat.

tested_features.POST /api/live_threads/start: PASSED - Creates new thread with user/pet info
tested_features.GET /api/live_threads/active: PASSED - Returns active threads list (admin auth required)
tested_features.GET /api/live_threads/{thread_id}: PASSED - Returns thread details with messages
tested_features.POST /api/live_threads/{thread_id}/reply: PASSED - Concierge can reply to thread
tested_features.Thread auto-creation via /api/mira/chat: PASSED - Thread created when user messages Mira
tested_features.Admin notification for new thread: PASSED - Notification appears in bell icon
tested_features.Admin dashboard Live Threads tab: PASSED - Shows all active conversations with stats
